zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Stafford II於大約1379年出生在英國時，他的父親Humphrey Stafford33歲，母親Alice Greville35歲。他於1397年10月之前與Elizabeth Maltravers在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1376年住在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德。他在英國英格蘭多瑟特被列為sheriff 。他去世於1442年5月27日在英國享年64歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特阿波次波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Stafford II于大约1379年出生在英国时，他的父亲Humphrey Stafford33岁，母亲Alice Greville35岁。他于1397年10月之前与Elizabeth Maltravers在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1376年住在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德。他在英国英格兰多瑟特被列为sheriff 。他去世于1442年5月27日在英国享年64岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Stafford II was born about 1379, in England, his father, Humphrey Stafford, was 33 and his mother, Alice Greville, was 35. He married Elizabeth Maltravers before October 1397, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1376. His occupation is listed as sheriff  in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. He died on 27 May 1442, in England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Stafford II est né environ 1379, à Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Stafford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Greville, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maltravers avant octobre 1397, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1376. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff  à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1442, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Stafford II um 1379 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Stafford 33 und seine Mutter Alice Greville 35. Er hat vor Oktober 1397 in England Elizabeth Maltravers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1376 hat er in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. sein Beruf ist als sheriff  in Dorset, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Mai 1442 im Alter von 64 Jahren in England und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford II è nato il circa 1379 nel England, il suo padre, Humphrey Stafford, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice Greville, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maltravers prima del ottobre 1397, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1376. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff  nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 27 maggio 1442, nel England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Stafford IIが約1379年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Humphrey Staffordは33歳，母Alice Grevilleは35歳であった。1397年10月以前にイギリスでElizabeth Maltraversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年にはイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードに住んでいた。イギリスイギリスドールセトでの職業はsheriff と記録されている。彼は1442年5月27日にイギリスで64歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトアボトスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Stafford II(이)가 대략 1379년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Greville(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1397년 10월 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth Maltravers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1376년도에 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 sheriff 이었다. 그는 1442년 5월 27일 영국에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford II nasceu aproximadamente 1379, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Stafford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Greville, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maltravers antes outubro de 1397, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1376. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff  em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1442, em Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ro.Bishop's Frome, Herefordshire, England: Bishop's Frome, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Stafford II родился около 1379 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Greville, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maltravers перед октябрь 1397 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1376 году.  Он работал по профессии sheriff  в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 27 мая 1442 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Stafford II nació aproximadamente 1379, en Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Stafford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice Greville, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maltravers antes de octubre de 1397, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1376. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff  en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1442, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.
